intentSynonyms: delete an env var in netlify
remove an env var in netlify
trash an env var in netlify
permanently delete an env var in netlify
delete an environment variable in netlify
description: Delete an environment variable from a Netlify account by its key name. Optionally scope to a specific site. This action cannot be undone.

account_id.description: The account ID the variable belongs to

key.description: The environment variable key name to delete

site_id.description: Optional site ID to scope to a specific site
